title: Cold-stress buddy observation card
summary: Check shivering, speech, coordination, alertness, wet clothing, wind exposure, and the ability to warm safely.
content: Check shivering, speech, coordination, alertness, wet clothing, wind exposure, and the ability to warm safely. Move to shelter, remove wet layers when safe, insulate, and call emergency help for confusion, reduced consciousness, or severe deterioration. Do not use direct intense heat on numb skin or give alcohol as a warming method.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Cold-stress buddy observation card”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Cold-stress buddy observation card»
steps: Check shivering, speech, coordination, alertness, wet clothing, wind exposure, and the ability to warm safely.
Move to shelter, remove wet layers when safe, insulate, and call emergency help for confusion, reduced consciousness, or severe deterioration.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Cold-stress buddy observation card.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Cold-stress buddy observation card.
warnings: Do not use direct intense heat on numb skin or give alcohol as a warming method.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Cold-stress buddy observation card.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Cold-stress buddy observation card.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Cold-stress buddy observation card.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Cold-stress buddy observation card.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Cold-stress buddy observation card.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during Cold-stress buddy observation card.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Cold-stress buddy observation card.
short_term: For Cold-stress buddy observation card, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Cold-stress buddy observation card, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Cold-stress buddy observation card, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Cold-stress buddy observation card to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
